base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_logo_us — a ui from 1987 contra. 'CONTRA' US title — bold blood-red serif with skyscape and Bill+Lance silhouettes on rocks. © 1988 Konami. 'PUSH START BUTTON'. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
